stages.task: Speak with Corin in the catacombs.
stages.description: A child in the hidden catacombs keeps watching the dark lower hall.

stages.task: Search the deeper catacombs for Corin's blue ball.
stages.description: Corin lost his blue ball when Eda kicked it down the hall. The children are not allowed past the survivor camp.

stages.task: Return the blue ball to Corin.
stages.description: You found the blue ball in the lower catacombs. Corin is waiting near the stair.
You returned Corin's blue ball. Corin gave you a Censure Entry Roll, and Hanne pressed a clean field dressing into your hand.

objectives.text: Find the blue ball deeper in the catacombs.
Return the blue ball to Corin.
